MONET 0.1.0
  • Reference

F1 Neutral Dosage Data

Source: R/data.R
vignette_dos_F1only_neutral.Rd

Genetic marker data in dosage format for 900 F1 individuals at 2000 neutral loci. This dataset represents offspring genotypes from within-population crosses.

data(vignette_dos_F1only_neutral)

Format

A 900×2000 numeric matrix where:

Rows

900 F1 individuals (50 per population × 18 populations)

Columns

2000 neutral loci

Values

Dosage format: 0 (homozygote reference), 1 (heterozygote), 2 (homozygote alternate)

Source

Generated from simulated crosses using parental neutral marker data

Details

This matrix contains neutral genetic markers for F1 offspring in dosage format, which is required input for calculate_coancestries(). The dosage format represents the number of reference alleles each individual carries.

The F1 individuals were generated through within-population crosses from the parental generation (neutral_data_g3000.dat). This data is used to calculate the M matrix (within-population relatedness).

See also

calculate_coancestries for using this data to compute relatedness matrices

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Load the data
dos_F1 <- readRDS(
  system.file("extdata", "vignette_dos_F1only_neutral.rds", package = "MONET")
)

# Check dimensions
dim(dos_F1)  # 900 individuals × 2000 loci

# Summary of dosage values
table(dos_F1[1:10, 1:10])
} # }

Contents
